CustomField.description: Identifies whether the user is a special assignee for specific Master programs (e.g., Master of Technology in Composites, Computer Sciences and Engineering, Microelectronics and Semiconductors).
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Identifies whether the user is a special assignee for specific Master programs (e.g., Master of Technology in Composites, Computer Sciences and Engineering, Microelectronics and Semiconductors).
CustomField.label: Is Special Assignee
